info.title: Callception API
info.description: AI-powered call management, appointment tracking, and customer service automation platform. Provides voice AI pipeline, CRM, ticketing, billing, and multi-tenant management capabilities.

tags.name: Knowledge Base
tags.description: Document ingestion, search, and RAG queries

tags.name: Voice Pipeline
tags.description: Voice AI endpoints — TTS, STT, LLM inference, sessions, pipeline

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Subscription checkout, usage, analytics, invoices, emergency mode

tags.name: Tenant
tags.description: Tenant management, settings, Twilio setup, GDPR

tags.name: Twilio
tags.description: Twilio telephony integration — incoming calls, gather, status, recording, phone numbers

tags.name: AI
tags.description: AI services — intent detection, RAG search, provider status

tags.name: Compliance
tags.description: Audit logs, PII redaction, consent recording

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Daily, weekly, monthly, and custom reports

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: External webhook endpoints for call logging

get.description: Returns all customers for the authenticated tenant.

post.description: Creates a new customer record. Requires strict auth.

patch.description: Partial update of customer fields. At least one field must be provided.

get.description: List complaints or info requests filtered by type, customerId, and status.

post.description: Create a new complaint or info request. Requires customerId or customerName.

get.description: Without query param: lists KB documents. With query param: searches KB via RAG. With action=stats: returns KB statistics.

post.description: Ingest a new document into the knowledge base. Supports JSON body (text/URL) or multipart file upload (PDF, TXT, DOCX).
Converts text to audio using ElevenLabs (primary) with OpenAI fallback. Returns audio/mpeg stream.
Transcribes audio using Deepgram Nova-2. Accepts multipart/form-data with audio file or raw audio stream.

200.description: STT provider info and supported features

post.description: Multi-LLM inference with fallback chain: Groq (primary) -> OpenAI (secondary) -> Personaplex (GPU) -> graceful fallback. Supports multi-turn conversation via session_id.

get.description: Returns cache stats, circuit breaker states, and provider availability.
Returns WebSocket URL and audio format requirements for real-time voice.

200.description: Voice pipeline health status including GPU, LLM, and circuit breaker states

get.description: Tests all pipeline components: health, intent detection, LLM chain, cache, circuit breakers.

post.summary: Start or interact with voice pipeline session

200.description: Pipeline session info or text response

get.summary: List agents or get specific agent

delete.description: Only owners and admins can delete agents.

get.description: Returns pricing plans for display. Public endpoint.

post.description: Creates a Lemon Squeezy checkout URL for subscription payment. Owner/admin only.
Receives and processes subscription lifecycle events from Lemon Squeezy. Verifies HMAC-SHA256 signature.

200.description: Usage stats, cost breakdown, and limits

get.description: Returns analytics data for dashboard charts (recharts compatible).

200.description: Emergency mode status and cost usage

post.description: Emergency mode switches body TTS to cheaper OpenAI provider.
Updates subscription variant on Lemon Squeezy. Owner/admin only.

get.description: Returns aggregated KPIs, call trends, complaint categories, usage, recent activity, and voice pipeline summary.
Returns available automation hooks and configured webhooks for the tenant.

post.description: Processes inbound automation actions from n8n or API key authenticated clients.

get.description: Checks Firebase, Personaplex, and service configurations. Returns overall health status.
Checks all critical subsystems for production readiness. Returns per-subsystem status and overall GO/NO-GO decision.

201.description: Tenant created with caller assigned as owner

post.description: Owner/admin only. Owners can assign any role; admins cannot assign owner role.

get.description: Returns company info, AI assistant config, feature toggles, and subscription status.

put.description: Partial update of tenant settings. Owner/admin only.

post.description: Creates an isolated Twilio subaccount for the tenant. Owner/admin only.

get.description: Exports all tenant data as a downloadable JSON file. Owner/admin only.

post.summary: Delete or anonymize customer data (GDPR Article 17)
post.description: Permanently delete or anonymize a customer and all linked records. Owner/admin only.
Called by Twilio when a call arrives. Resolves tenant, validates subscription, returns TwiML with greeting and speech gather.
Called by Twilio after speech recognition. Processes with LLM and returns TwiML with AI response.
Called by Twilio when call status changes. Updates call record and meters usage.
Called by Twilio when recording completes. Stores recording URL in Firestore.

get.description: Lists phone numbers mapped to this tenant. Admin/owner only.

post.description: Maps a phone number to the tenant. Optionally auto-configures Twilio webhooks.
Checks registration, tenant config, subaccount, and webhook configuration.
Tests the call flow without a real Twilio call.
Search FAQ knowledge base and optionally generate an answer with RAG.

200.description: Search results and optional generated answer

get.description: Returns availability of Ollama and OpenAI providers.

parameters.name: week
parameters.description: Any date within the target week

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Any date within the target month

get.description: Returns health summary, system info (memory, uptime), and recent performance metrics.
Admin/owner only. Returns recent application errors.

post.description: Rate limited per IP (50/min).
Public webhook endpoint. Requires tenantId in body or headers. Auto-creates customer if not found.

get.description: Vercel cron job. Finds upcoming appointments (next 24h) and sends reminder emails. Requires CRON_SECRET.

BearerAuth.description: Firebase ID token for authenticated requests

TenantHeader.name: x-user-tenant
TenantHeader.description: Tenant ID header set by authentication middleware
